name: 荒古战纪
short_description: “Age of Mythology Battle"is a card based turn based combat game adapted from ancient mythology, featuring forty different styles and skills of Wasteland gods who will help players complete their journey from Chaos to the Jedi Sky Pass.
detailed_description:
Forty different styles of gods, more lineups with more equipment combinations.

Chi initiated the war the real purpose is to challenge the Kunlun? Why are most of the ancient texts and secret arts lost in broken generations? Where did the miracles of the ancient times come from? Why the era of human and god symbiosis has ended?

Witness the battle between gods and devils in the Desolate Ancient Period, and experience the Battle of Deer and Gong Gong's fight for the Emperor, from the Ancient Mythical Era to the Jedi Heavenly Passage.

A variety of gameplay: gold, experience, artifacts, spirit stone four copies. There are also Jiu Li stronghold, barren god tower, Chi You's death and other challenging gameplay and difficult levels.

Coin directly buy “God stone”, draw cards to draw to cool!

Official discussion QQ group:653793832
